title: Holotag
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''holotag''' was a tag used to mark evidence at a crime scene. Red holotags were used for body parts and blue holotags were used for inorganic evidence.

{{Stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]''
